subtitle: Computer Science Student | University of Avignon

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph:
Second-year computer science student at the University of Avignon, I am passionate about digital creation, web development, and UX/UI design. Through this portfolio, I invite you to discover my world: my technical skills, my projects, and the areas in which I can contribute.

My goal: to turn ideas into concrete, aesthetic, and functional projects, while continuing to progress in a field that motivates me every day.

items.exp1:

Role: Intern.

items.exp2:

items.exp3:

Role: Operations Manager.

Receipt and storage of medicines.
